{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055623288C48600FC67713EB0C"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619348044616205080","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，还蛮期待后续展开的。话说不乘着香克斯不成熟的时候多欺负欺负他吗？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774021075,"group_id":"7607449410229783577","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N01JK69gAuLgKyOWmsn4c/w=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3a715bf2b07f41d1a8e9ffe31f733ee6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706840&x-signature=qZoV%2F%2FVDelZ3rVTILnawrcn3Kwg%3D","user_id":"504049213909242","user_name":"王负剑王福建"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"504049213909242","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607449410229783577","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【半无脑】【后期慢热】【大剑豪】【顶级体术】【多女主】
【中途成为海贼王船员，抵达拉夫德鲁。】
鸟鸟果实•幻兽种•金乌形态
坏消息：穿了，还穿成了奴隶。
更坏的消息：这里是海贼世界。
最坏的消息：地点是神之谷。
为了让自己活下去。
吉斯跟着大熊，金妮，伊万科夫行动，想混一颗稀恶魔果实，获得有自保能力。
在索尔贝王国。
为了让大熊与金妮在未来能活下去。
吉斯主动当起男妈妈的责任，训练两小只的实力。
一出海。
碰到了奥哈拉寻找历史正文的先遣队。
意外与妮可罗宾的母亲，妮可•奥尔维亚有一段情缘。
在双子岬。
吉斯加入罗杰海贼团。
成为香克斯，巴基的大哥。
在鱼人岛。
致力于打击奴隶贩的吉斯，救下一只小美人鱼。
以后打算当童养媳养起来～
……
若干年后。
吉斯：“我咋感觉这辈子带了好多孩子？算了，这些可怜的娃，能帮一个是一个。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ce1b2f469c346cec249f73fa791f316b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜欢同人的摆烂小王","author_id":"","book_id":"7607449410229783577","book_name":"海贼王：从神之谷开始大逃杀","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7607449442727248409","read_count":"29741","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"136768"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"56","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,穿越,海贼,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ce1b2f469c346cec249f73fa791f316b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779314183&x-signature=hy13188XPZFd9RkITax5mf0SP68%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3670597414957428","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055623288C48600FC67
